title: Communauté de communes du Canton de Bray-sur-Seine
summary: The Communauté de communes du Canton de Bray-sur-Seine (after 2006: Communauté de communes de la Bassée) is a former federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in October 1973. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de la Bassée - Montois in January 2014.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Canton de Bray-sur-Seine (after 2006: Communauté de communes de la Bassée) is a former federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in October 1973. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de la Bassée - Montois in January 2014.

Composition
The Communauté de communes comprised the following communes:
